title: My Team template epics board deploys with broken automations
excerpt: The “My Team” template is now deploying with different board templates than it used to, and the Epics board contains automations that reference columns that have been removed. The group structure of the board still has t…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
The “My Team” template is now deploying with different board templates than it used to, and the Epics board contains automations that reference columns that have been removed. The group structure of the board still has the Q1 group at the top, with an automation that would move an epic to that top group - if the Epic - Planned Q column still existed.

Tasks board no longer includes half the views either, and the By Epics view is missing for example. Sprint Planning dashboard is missing.

But beyond that, Epics board contains 3 automations - none of which work because they reference non-existent columns.

Is this just carelessness modifying the product templates and not validating them fully?
